title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXIV. Riddles.
content:
When I went up sandy hill,
        I met a sandy boy;
        I cut his throat, I sucked his blood,
        And left his skin a hanging-o.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXIV. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
